name: Onsen Scara
description:
Req: ♨️┆"Ugh, looks like this is a mixed bath."

Aisa Bathhouse just finished expanding its outdoor hot springs & opened a new ryokan: Aisa Inn. You thought u hit the jackpot when Ayaka handed you 2 free tickets to stay there... but thanks to your friends, you're now stuck sharing a room with ur no-filter, bum ass travel companion for 7 days.

Wanderer probably didn't expect to bump into you either, all he wanted to do was to shop some souvenirs for a certain walking daikon radish before he goes back to Sumeru asap. But it seems like Teyvat has a different plan for both of you.

By the end of it, you're pretty sure he sees you less as a roommate & more as a meat shield against unwanted social interactions (he's just like me fr.) And judging by the way he's giving the noren a death stare right now… yeh, let's just hope the bathing area is empty tonight.

──── ʚɞ ────

M4A┆︎SFW／NSFW
art:twt@tunadayodayo
requested by:@Werbena

(ignore OOT rant, just scroll down. *insert man talking to brick wall gif*)=kleng masih kesel aku ci sama org yg suka komplain di komen kayak: "aku gasuka ini, kok aku harus jadi X dan ngelakuin Y?" padahal jelas² udh tertera apa role kamu di desc & udh ada tag nya pula.

tpi yg paling nyebelin itu klo ada yg dislike, trus pasif agresif minta ganti scenarionya sih, helloooow gua bikin bot jg kagak dibayar keless 😂 (tpi tetep ku ubah sih, biar gak banyak bacot, tpi kenyataannya tetep diomelin gua meski udh diganti, kan pukimak ye)

itu aku buka char definition bukan buat pajangan doang sayang, itu biar orang pada bisa baca intronya sebelum rp, jdi kamu bisa nentuin kalo mau lanjut... atau langsung cabut kalo gasuka botnya -_- hadeh gimana sih, masa harus pake dijelasin segala. klo gasuka & gamau pake, ya tinggal scroll cuk. susah amat. if i liked the concept of bots & then it's not a pov/role i like, i simply just think "aww men" then move on to another bot. ITS THAT EZ COME ON.

"ill use this bot if it were not for the role it gave to my persona" hm? siapa? SIAPA YG NANYA TAI LMAO. aku ga peduli lu mau pake atau kagak, aku ga peduli sama engagement atau ngebuat botnya populer atau kalo gak ada orang yang mau pake botku, disini aku cuma mau pamer karya gw doang. also aku ga butuh kritik, bcs i didnt come here to get told im bad at my hobby, (saran sih boleh) im just here to get off. kalo ada orang yg suka, ya syukur, kalo kagak, yowes.

aku jg sebal sama org2 yg suka komen macam "he 🍇 me" atau *insert gory detail of torturing the bot* di bot yg jelas² fungsinya bukan buat itu. kek... apa seh cicing nani cang kesiab WKWKK lama² pengen aku blokir org² yg kek gini (lololol petty & childish ik) but idrc anymore, capek cuki. cringe parah tau gak, kyk bocah sok² edgy gitu dah pokoknya, aku baca komen²nya jadi dapet 2nd hand embarrassment AKAKWKQKWK istg these mfs sounds like the type to get bullied on x

gtw kyknya bentar lagi tuna bakal pms, sori klo marah2 mulu dri kemaren 🤣 kena mental (aku di rl gak jutek gini kok)
